item.text: What part of the lotus plant is frequently used in South and East Asian cookery?
Which of these capital cities ends in the same 3 letters as its corresponding country?
Name the actress that played 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' in the hit TV show.
In science, what property of a substance is defined by mass per unit of volume?
In 'Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone', it is revealed that which character has a scar in the shape of the London Underground map on their knee?
Excluding the words 'football club', three teams in the Championship have three words in their name. They are Queens Park Rangers, West Bromwich Albion and what other team?
Which of these celebrities apparently takes a size 11 shoe?
The Catholic pilgrimage town of Lourdes is at the foot of what mountain range?
Amblyopia is more commonly known as what optical condition?
In which year was the first successful fly-by mission of the planet Mars completed by the NASA probe Mariner 4?
In a controversial move that ruffled feathers, which of the following won the 2021 New Zealand Bird of the Year competition via an online poll?
item.answer_text: The bat is a mammal not a bird, but its inclusion raised awareness that it is an endangered species
item.long_answer: The bat is a mammal not a bird, but its inclusion raised awareness that it is an endangered species

item.text: Starting with the most, put these coffee shop chains in order of how many outlets they have in the UK.
item.answer_text: Costa 2681, Starbucks 1025, Caffè Nero 648 (all as of Feb 2021)
item.long_answer: Costa 2681, Starbucks 1025, Caffè Nero 648 (all as of Feb 2021)

item.text: With what profession would you associate the name Marlon Teixeira?
In 2012, Mountain Dew put the naming of their new flavour out to an online poll. Which of these was NOT in the top 10 leaderboard of names?
Which type of classic car is older?
item.answer_text: In the UK, 'classic cars' range from veteran (pre-First World War), to vintage (1919-1930), to post-vintage (1930s).
item.long_answer: In the UK, 'classic cars' range from veteran (pre-First World War), to vintage (1919-1930), to post-vintage (1930s).

item.text: Which country does the island of Majorca belong to?
In the Disney film, Bambi was an orphan but how did his mum die?
Which martial arts film star lends his name to a 2018 hit by Tiesto and Dzeko?
Which European country was ruled by Francisco Franco between 1939 and 1975?
In the Bible, the main religious figures such as Noah and Abraham are descended from which of Adam and Eve's sons?
